original_image_tags: The page is an aged, yellowed document with three hole-punches at the top, showing signs of wear and minor staining. There is a "FILED" stamp partially obscured in the center.

elements.description: Two red rubber stamps at the bottom: one rectangular stamp reading 'COMMUNICATIONS SECTION / JLS:FM MAILED 10 / JUL 31 1947 P.M. / FEDERAL BUREAU OF INVESTIGATION / DEPARTMENT OF JUSTICE' and one date stamp reading '58 AUG 13'.

judge.reason: Description A mentions three hole-punches at the top and a 'FILED' stamp, while Description B describes two red rubber stamps at the bottom with completely different content and placement, indicating they are describing different visual elements.
